template.name: flow
template.value: graph TD A[Square Rect] --> B((Circle)) A --> C(Round Rect) B --> D{Rhombus} C --> D

template.name: seq
template.value: sequenceDiagram participant Alice participant Bob Alice->>Bob: Hello Bob, how are you? Bob-->>Alice: Jolly good!

template.name: class
template.value: classDiagram Class01 <|-- dev.Class02 Class03 *-- Class04 Class05 o-- Class06
